message:
style(tests/lifecycle_matrix): collapse two `files` as_array bindings onto one line

The multi-line `let files = status["files"]\n    .as_array()\n    .expect(...)`
form added no readability over the single-line equivalent in these two
call sites (`models_status_and_cache_lifecycle_agree_on_state_machine_identity`
and `models_status_fail_open_and_manifest_integrity_invariants`). Collapsing
matches the surrounding style in this file and keeps rustfmt happy.

Pure whitespace/formatting change — no behavior delta, no invariants altered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
